# WO-52 server handoff manifest
# Generated by: npm run to-server:prepare

dist-web/                          Production UI (Vite build + build-stamp.json)

server/scripts/archive-common.sh   Include dist-web in tarballs; deploy defaults
server/scripts/highascg-exfat-server-update.sh   drop-update/ primary path
server/scripts/write-highascg-systemd-unit.sh    Headless opt-in only
server/config/server-update-rsync-excludes.txt     Allow dist-web rsync
server/src/repo-paths.js           WO-52 comments
server/src/server/headless-mode.js WO-52 comments
server/tools/release/make-github-release-server.sh
server/tools/eggs/live-usb/systemd/highascg.service.d-10-headless.conf.example
server/client-scripts/sync-dist-web-from-client.sh   NEW
server/client-scripts/dev-push.sh

apply-to-server.sh                 Copy dist-web + server/ → SERVER_ROOT
README.md
WO52_SERVER_HANDOFF.md             Operator deploy steps
AGENT_SERVER_CLIENT_MERGE.md       Agent brief — server-side WO-52 expectations

Apply:
  SERVER_ROOT=/path/to/highascg-server bash to_server/apply-to-server.sh

Or local monorepo:
  npm run to-server:apply
